long_description:
[COM]-RIAS-Migration-Pod-Crashloopbackoff [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/troubleshooting_pods_crash_loopback.html
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod crashloopbackoff issue in rias-migration
TIP Short Description: Pods in crashloopbackoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-ips:::rias-ng-us-south-dal13-prod:microservice:regional-migration-server-f5866d57c-kcmxj
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"regional-migration-server.*", reason!~"ContainerCreating" ,kube_cluster_name !~"us-south-ngdc-test.*"} * on(kube_node_name) group_left(kube_cluster_name) kube_node_sysdig_ready{kube_cluster_name=~".*rias.*"}) by (kube_node_name, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name, reason) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-south-dal13-prod' and kube_node_name = '10.208.193.247' and kube_pod_name = 'regional-migration-server-f5866d57c-kcmxj' and reason = 'CrashLoopBackOff'

Time:             12/02/2025 04:16 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/5f9d2351-5c34-4af7-b7d7-ff987623cc0f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179311863%2Fdetails
